page.title: Coin Purchase Proposal
page.description: Create a DAO proposal to buy content or creator coins using Zora Coins SDK

wizard.insufficientPowerDesc: You need at least {required} votes to create a proposal.

form.infoBody: This wizard will generate a complete DAO proposal to purchase a content or creator coin using the Zora Coins SDK. The trade executes through the Uniswap v4 router with proper slippage protection.
form.coinAddressHelp: The ERC-20 address of the content or creator coin to purchase
form.coinNameHelp: Display name for the coin (used in proposal title)
form.ethAmountHelp: Amount of ETH the DAO treasury will spend

preview.summaryBody: This proposal will purchase {name} using {amount} ETH from the treasury with a maximum slippage of {slippage}%.
